meta.author: rosis_s@ascendly.one
meta.notes: Reproduces TODAY'S pipeline (scrape -> title gate -> strict ICP review -> writer) purely as config. This is the parity target: the new executor must produce the same accept/reject + personalization as the legacy path before any workspace migrates. No Knowledge layer here on purpose — it mirrors current behaviour.

strategy.business_overview: Ascendly runs done-for-you B2B outbound: building targeted lead lists, enriching them, and writing personalized cold email for clients.

offers.name: Managed Outbound
offers.description: List building + enrichment + personalized cold email campaigns.
offers.value_prop: Booked meetings without hiring an SDR team.

strategy.positioning: Personalization at scale that still reads like a human wrote it.
strategy.objectives: Book qualified sales calls for the client.
strategy.campaign_goals: Positive replies and booked meetings from cold email.
strategy.icp: B2B companies where the person holds a senior/decision-making title (owner, founder, C-level, VP, head, director) and the company has a real website describing a clear service or product.
strategy.non_icp: Junior titles, personal/parked/dead websites, or companies with no discernible B2B offer.
strategy.constraints: Never pitch the prospect's own service back to them. The copy must pitch the CLIENT's service to the prospect.

modules.label: ICP Review
Email Personalization
